text:
Tab,

I have found and fixed a bug which shows up on FreeBSD 6.x but not 7.x. 
  There is therefore a new distfile.  You may generate a new checksum 
accordingly.

The Giant Robots are coming...

-- 
James Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
